seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional tone, ensuring it is clear and concise while avoiding overly formal or technical language.
new_constraint: Use an informal tone throughout the email.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. Tailor the email for a professional tone, ensuring it is clear and concise while avoiding overly formal or technical language. Use an informal tone throughout the email.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Hi [Hotel Name] Team,

Hope you're having a good week!

I was wondering if you have any rooms available for next weekend, [Start Date of Weekend] to [End Date of Weekend]?

We'd be looking for [Number] room(s) for [Number] night(s). [Optional: Briefly mention the type of room you're interested in, e.g., "A standard room would be great," or "If you have a double queen, that would be perfect."].

Could you let me know what you have available and what the rates are for those dates?

Thanks so much for your help! Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number - Optional]<turn|>
